viewport-modifier.description: Amount of viewport to add to sizing classes (only on screens wider than 40rem)

max-size-modifer.description: Maximum amount the viewport modifier can increase a sizing token by.

neg-15.description: Extremely large negative spacing (major overlap or pull effects).

mobile.description: Size of a small mobile device.

mobile-lg.description: Size of a larger mobile device.

tablet-lg.description: Size of a larger tablet device.

desktop.description: Size of a small desktop device.

desktop-lg.description: Size of a larger desktop device.

widescreen.description: Size of a large desktop device.

section.description: Ideal max size of a page section.

section-margin-block.description: Preferred vertical margin for page sections.

section-margin-inline.description: Preferred horizontal margin for page sections.

aside.description: Preferred size for an aside element.

ink-active.description: Label color when active or pressed.

border-color-selected.description: Border color when the button is selected/active.

border-style.description: Border style (solid, dashed, etc) for standard buttons.

font-size.description: Base font size for button labels.

gap.description: Gap between button icon and label.

group-gap.description: Gap between buttons when rendered in a group.

min-height.description: Minimum height to ensure tappable area.

box-shadow-focus.description: Box shadow in focus state (in addition to outline).

cursor.description: Cursor style when hovering over buttons.

flex-direction.description: Direction of icon and label layout.

justify-content.description: Main axis alignment for button contents.

align-items.description: Cross axis alignment for button contents.

transition-property.value: background-color, color, border-color, box-shadow, transform, outline
transition-property.description: CSS properties that should animate on interaction.

transition-delay.description: Delay before CSS properties run through their animate on interaction.

viewport-font-size-modifier.description: Viewport modifier for responsive font sizing, added to each root font size on screen resolutions over 40rem. Set to 0 to disable responsive font sizing.

max-font-size-modifer.description: Maximum font size increase allowed when using responsive font sizing.

spacing-modifier.description: Amount to multiple spacing variables by.

line-height-modifier.description: Amount to multiple line height variables by.

letter-spacing-modifier.description: Amount to multiple letter spacing variables by.

fallback-font-size-modifier.description: Fallback amount to multiple font size variables by in the event their specific modifier isn't set.

transition-timing-modifier.description: Amount to multiply transition durations by (automatically set to 0 with media query match for 'prefers-reduced-motion'

primary.description: Primary font family for use in the system. Usually used for body content and interface items.

alt.description: Alternate font family for use in the system. Primarily used for headings.

monospace.description: Monospaced font family for use in the system. Primarily used for displaying code or for accessibility.

interface.description: Font family used for things like buttons or input fields.

heading.description: Font family used for heading elements.

canvas.description: Base positive canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-soft.description: Soft positive canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.description: Muted positive canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-strong.description: Strong positive canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-inverse.description: Base inverse positive canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse positive canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse positive canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse positive canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.description: Base positive ink color for text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-soft.description: Soft positive ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons.

ink-muted.description: Muted positive ink color for subtle or secondary text and icons.

ink-inverse.description: Base inverse positive ink color for text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse positive ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse positive ink color for subtle text and icons on inverse canvases.

border-soft.description: Soft positive border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-muted.description: Muted positive border color for subtle outlines and dividers.

border-strong.description: Strong positive border color for high-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse positive border color for high-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.
